q1.sql: select count(*) from recording rec where rec.length > (select [FACTOR] * avg(length) from recording where length is not null)

q2.sql: select case when rec.length < [SHORT_MS] then 'short' when rec.length < [LONG_MS] then 'medium' else 'long' end as duration_class, count(*) as n, round(avg(rec.length) / 60000, 2) as avg_minutes from recording rec where rec.length is not null group by duration_class order by n desc

q3.sql: select count(*) from artist a where lower(a.col_2) like [NAME_PATTERN] and cast(a.col_4 as integer) >= [BEGIN_YEAR] and exists (select 1 from artist_credit_name acn where acn.artist = cast(a.col_0 as integer))

q4.sql: select tag.name, count(*) as tagged_groups from tag, release_group_tag rgt where tag.name in [TAG_LIST] and rgt.tag = tag.id and rgt.count >= [MIN_COUNT] group by tag.name having count(*) >= [MIN_TAGGED] order by tagged_groups desc

q5.sql: select count(*) from artist a, artist_type t where t.name = [ARTIST_TYPE] and cast(a.col_10 as integer) = t.id and cast(a.col_4 as integer) between [START_YEAR] and [END_YEAR] and not exists (select 1 from artist_credit_name acn where acn.artist = cast(a.col_0 as integer))

q6.sql: select ar.col_2 as country, count(*) as releases, count(*) filter (where rc.date_year >= [RECENT_YEAR]) as recent_releases from release_country rc, area ar where rc.country = cast(ar.col_0 as integer) and rc.date_year between [START_YEAR] and [END_YEAR] group by ar.col_2 order by releases desc limit [TOP_K]

q7.sql: select rc.date_year as year, rc.country, count(*) as n from release_country rc where rc.date_year between [START_YEAR] and [END_YEAR] group by rc.date_year, rc.country qualify row_number() over (partition by rc.date_year order by count(*) desc) <= [TOP_PER_YEAR] order by year, n desc

q8.sql: select r.name, sum(m.track_count) as total_tracks from release r, medium m, medium_format mf where mf.name = [FORMAT] and m.format = mf.id and r.id = m.release group by r.name having sum(m.track_count) between [MIN_TRACKS] and [MAX_TRACKS] order by total_tracks desc, r.name limit [TOP_K]

q9.sql: select ar.col_2 as country, count(distinct rl.label) as labels, count(*) as releases from label l, label_type lt, release_label rl, release r, release_country rc, area ar where lt.name = [LABEL_TYPE] and cast(l.col_10 as integer) = lt.id and rl.label = cast(l.col_0 as integer) and r.id = rl.release and rc.release = r.id and rc.country = cast(ar.col_0 as integer) and ar.col_2 in [COUNTRY_LIST] and rc.date_year between [START_YEAR] and [END_YEAR] group by ar.col_2 order by releases desc

q10.sql: with rated as (select rgm.first_release_date_year as year, count(*) as n, avg(rgm.rating) as avg_rating from tag, release_group_tag rgt, release_group rg, release_group_primary_type pt, release_group_meta rgm where tag.name = [TAG_NAME] and rgt.tag = tag.id and rg.id = rgt.release_group and pt.name = [PRIMARY_TYPE] and rg.type = pt.id and rgm.id = rg.id and rgm.rating >= [MIN_RATING] and rgm.rating_count >= [MIN_RATING_COUNT] and rgm.first_release_date_year between [START_YEAR] and [END_YEAR] group by rgm.first_release_date_year) select year, n, round(avg_rating, 1) as avg_rating, round(avg_rating - lag(avg_rating) over (order by year), 1) as rating_delta from rated order by year
